title: The Ancient Kingdom’s Shadow
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Bonney, Marines, Unknown person #14, Vegapunk, Kuma as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Decline their request to the Harbor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: KAMA BAKKA KINGDOM ON THE GRAND LINE

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Something strange is happening to Kuma!!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Wait, Kuma! You are still under repair!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Is he still under Navy control?!

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: He lost almost all of his conscience!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's the matter, Kuma? Where are you going?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From now on, our battle as the revolutionary army... will start!!
